resetPassword.useOAuth: Your account does not use a password for signing in. Please use the button below to access your account.

error.clientNotFound: This login provider is not available.
error.providerNotConfigured: This login provider is not configured correctly. Please contact support.
error.invalidState: Something went wrong. Please try logging in again.
error.providerError: The login provider returned an error: %error%
error.loginFailed: Login failed. Please try again or use a different login method. If the problem persists, feel free to contact our support team.
error.noAccountFound: No matching account was found for your %provider% login. Please register first to continue.
error.accountAlreadyConnected: This provider account is already linked to a different customer.
error.loginRequired: Please log in before connecting an account.
error.connectFailed: Could not connect the account. Please try again.
error.disconnectFailed: Could not disconnect the account. Please try again.
error.emailMismatch: The email address from the provider does not match your account email. If your email address has changed, please contact the shop owner.
